overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city center. The player descends illuminated stairs, crosses busy commercial streets with massive digital billboards, and navigates through districts with towering glass skyscrapers and heavy vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza with illuminated stair descent

events.description: begins descending illuminated concrete stairs with blue neon edges
exits upper plaza level into lower pedestrian area

agents.ego_description: walking across reflective plaza tiles and descending illuminated stairs to lower level

notable_agents.action: person with purple hair and glowing neon necklace walking ahead

entered.detail: large glossy tiled ground reflecting neon lights and buildings
massive corner building covered in advertisements including BUY 2 GET 1 FREE
cyan illuminated cylindrical pillars lining the plaza edge

rectangular planters with small trees and blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban plaza with reflective tiles and glowing neon pillars. The camera moves forward across the plaza and begins descending a wide illuminated staircase with blue neon edges, transitioning from the upper level to a lower pedestrian area while massive digital billboards tower overhead.

events.description: crosses street at yellow striped crosswalk with group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through lower plaza and crossing busy street intersection with other pedestrians

entered.detail: building with large white SEOCHO signage on facade
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: Having reached the bottom of the stairs, the scene opens into a busy commercial intersection. The camera moves through crowds of pedestrians toward a crosswalk, crossing the street as vehicles pass by. The SEOCHO building dominates the right side while the massive digital billboard tower remains visible to the left.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view skyscrapers and large billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along city street while looking up at towering buildings and advertisements

entered.detail: large purple advertisement featuring muscular figure with SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR text
elevated walkway connecting buildings with glass railings
vertical glass and steel building facade with multiple advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a city street surrounded by towering skyscrapers forming an urban canyon. The perspective shifts upward to reveal massive vertical billboards including a prominent purple SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR advertisement. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead as the SEOCHO building recedes into the distance.

events.description: waits at intersection for black sedan and other vehicles to pass
crosses street as traffic light turns green

agents.ego_description: navigating along sidewalk, waiting for traffic, then crossing multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through intersection followed by pickup truck

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass and highway ramps with support columns
tall pole with pedestrian signal showing red hand then green walk
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk near the highway
wide staircase leading up to upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a busy city street with an elevated highway structure visible to the left. After waiting for a black sedan to pass at the intersection, the camera crosses the street as the traffic light changes. Palm trees line the sidewalk and a wide concrete staircase leading to an upper plaza becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with trees and seating

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete stairs to upper plaza
enters tree-lined upper plaza with outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and entering upper plaza area with trees and outdoor cafe seating

entered.detail: open pedestrian area with large trees and shaded spaces
mature trees providing shade over the plaza
rows of tables and chairs outside buildings
large curved digital screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase from the street level, transitioning into an elevated pedestrian plaza. The space opens into a tree-lined area with outdoor cafe seating and a large curved digital advertisement wall. The environment shifts from the busy traffic below to a more relaxed pedestrian zone with mature trees providing shade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a glowing urban plaza down into a bustling commercial district before ascending into a serene elevated pedestrian zone. It begins by moving across reflective tiles and descending a wide staircase with blue neon edges, transitioning from an upper level toward a crowded intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and the SEOCHO building. As the camera crosses the street and moves deeper into the urban canyon, the perspective shifts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and a prominent purple advertisement before passing under an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene then continues along a busy street lined with palm trees and elevated highways, pausing for a black sedan before crossing another intersection. Finally, the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, leaving the traffic behind to enter a shaded, tree-lined plaza featuring outdoor cafe seating and a large curved digital wall.
